output.code:
# Read the provided file
path = "/mnt/data/file-FwekBDgKxSC9V8ZWcYXoDq-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:5000]

# Find all segments inside double quotes and their indices
text = text  # already loaded
segments = []
start = 0
while True:
    i = text.find('"', start)
    if i == -1:
        break
    j = text.find('"', i+1)
    if j == -1:
        break
    inner = text[i+1:j]
    segments.append((i+1, j, inner))
    start = j+1

len(segments), segments[:10]

# Validate that slices match the inner text
all(text[s:e] == stext for s,e,stext in segments)

s,e,_ = segments[0]
context = text[s-5:e+5]
context, text[s:e]
